package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for inline_error_to_status_mapping_duplicated: Repeated error-to-status translation switches across handlers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule078NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule078NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule078NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario078Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule078NegativeService, input Rule078NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
